Validación de formulario
  • retroalimentación válida
    < !-- Note: A custom script is used to activate validation: var forms=document.querySelectorAll('.needs-validation') Array.prototype.slice.call(forms) .forEach(function (form) { form.addEventListener('submit', function (event) { if ( !form.checkValidity()) { event.preventDefault() event.stopPropagation() } form.classList.add('was-validated') } , false) }) -->
    ¡Se ve bien !
    ¡Se ve bien !
    @
    Por favor, elija un nombre de usuario.
    Proporcione una ciudad válida.
    Seleccione un estado válido.
    Proporcione un código postal válido.
    Debes aceptar antes de enviar.
  • información sobre herramientas válida
    < !-- Note: A custom script is used to activate validation: var forms=document.querySelectorAll('.needs-validation') Array.prototype.slice.call(forms) .forEach(function (form) { form.addEventListener('submit', function (event) { if ( !form.checkValidity()) { event.preventDefault() event.stopPropagation() } form.classList.add('was-validated') } , false) }) -->
    ¡Se ve bien !
    ¡Se ve bien !
    @
    Elija un nombre de usuario único y válido.
    Proporcione una ciudad válida.
    Seleccione un estado válido.
    Proporcione un código postal válido.
Acordeón
  • acordeón

    This is the first item's accordion body. It is hidden by default, until the collapse plugin adds the appropriate classes that we use to style each element. These classes control the overall appearance, as well as the showing and hiding via CSS transitions. You can modify any of this with custom CSS or overriding our default variables. It' s also worth noting that just about any HTML can go within the .accordion-body, though the transition does limit overflow.

    This is the second item's accordion body. It is hidden by default, until the collapse plugin adds the appropriate classes that we use to style each element. These classes control the overall appearance, as well as the showing and hiding via CSS transitions. You can modify any of this with custom CSS or overriding our default variables. It' s also worth noting that just about any HTML can go within the .accordion-body, though the transition does limit overflow.

    This is the third item's accordion body. It is hidden by default, until the collapse plugin adds the appropriate classes that we use to style each element. These classes control the overall appearance, as well as the showing and hiding via CSS transitions. You can modify any of this with custom CSS or overriding our default variables. It' s also worth noting that just about any HTML can go within the .accordion-body, though the transition does limit overflow.
  • acordeón a ras

    This is the first item's accordion body. It is hidden by default, until the collapse plugin adds the appropriate classes that we use to style each element. These classes control the overall appearance, as well as the showing and hiding via CSS transitions. You can modify any of this with custom CSS or overriding our default variables. It' s also worth noting that just about any HTML can go within the .accordion-body, though the transition does limit overflow.

    This is the second item's accordion body. It is hidden by default, until the collapse plugin adds the appropriate classes that we use to style each element. These classes control the overall appearance, as well as the showing and hiding via CSS transitions. You can modify any of this with custom CSS or overriding our default variables. It' s also worth noting that just about any HTML can go within the .accordion-body, though the transition does limit overflow.

    This is the third item's accordion body. It is hidden by default, until the collapse plugin adds the appropriate classes that we use to style each element. These classes control the overall appearance, as well as the showing and hiding via CSS transitions. You can modify any of this with custom CSS or overriding our default variables. It' s also worth noting that just about any HTML can go within the .accordion-body, though the transition does limit overflow.

Utilidad: Varios
  • selección de usuario { opción }

    This paragraph will be entirely selected when clicked by the user.

    This paragraph has default select behavior.

    This paragraph will not be selectable when clicked by the user.

  • pe- { opción }

    This linkcan not be clicked.

    This linkcan be clicked (this is default behavior).

    This linkcan not be clicked because the pointer-eventsproperty is inherited from its parent. However, this linkhas a pe-autoclass and can be clicked.

  • desbordamiento- { opción }
    This is an example of using .overflow-autoon an element with set width and height dimensions. By design, this content will vertically scroll.
    This is an example of using .overflow-hiddenon an element with set width and height dimensions.
    < !-- New -->This is an example of using .overflow-visibleon an element with set width and height dimensions.
    < !-- New -->This is an example of using .overflow-scrollon an element with set width and height dimensions.
  • sombra / sombra- { opción }
    No shadow
    Small shadow
    Regular shadow
    Larger shadow
  • w- { opción }
    Width 25%
    Width 50%
    Width 75%
    Width 100%
    Width auto
  • h- { opción }
    Height 25%
    Height 50%
    Height 75%
    Height 100%
    Height auto
  • mw-100
  • MH-100
    Max-height 100%
  • ventana gráfica
    Min-width 100vw
    Min-height 100vh
    Width 100vw
    Height 100vh
  • visible
    ...
  • invisible
    ...

  • float-*- { opción }
    < !-- float can be used for responsive cases with the help of .float- { sm|md|lg|xl|xxl } - { start|end|none } class -->

    Don't float on all viewport sizes

Utilidad: Texto
  • texto-*-inicio
    < !-- text-start can be used for responsive cases with the help of .text- { sm|md|lg|xl|xxl } -start class -->

    Start aligned text on all viewport sizes.

    Start aligned text on viewports sized SM (small) or wider.

    Start aligned text on viewports sized MD (medium) or wider.

    Start aligned text on viewports sized LG (large) or wider.

    Start aligned text on viewports sized XL (extra-large) or wider.

    Start aligned text on viewports sized XXL (extra-extra-large) or wider.

    < !-- New -->
  • texto-*-centro
    < !-- text-center can be used for responsive cases with the help of .text- { sm|md|lg|xl|xxl } -center class -->

    Center aligned text on all viewport sizes.

    Center aligned text on viewports sized SM (small) or wider.

    Center aligned text on viewports sized MD (medium) or wider.

    Center aligned text on viewports sized LG (large) or wider.

    Center aligned text on viewports sized XL (extra-large) or wider.

    Center aligned text on viewports sized XXL (extra-extra-large) or wider.

    < !-- New -->
  • texto-*-fin
    < !-- text-end can be used for responsive cases with the help of .text- { sm|md|lg|xl|xxl } -end class -->

    End aligned text on all viewport sizes.

    End aligned text on viewports sized SM (small) or wider.

    End aligned text on viewports sized MD (medium) or wider.

    End aligned text on viewports sized LG (large) or wider.

    End aligned text on viewports sized XL (extra-large) or wider.

    End aligned text on viewports sized XXL (extra-extra-large) or wider.

    < !-- New -->
  • ajuste de texto
    This text should wrap.
  • texto-nowrap
    This text should overflow the parent.
  • salto de texto

    mmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmm

  • texto- { opción }

    Lowercased text.

    Uppercased text.

    CapiTaliZed text.

  • fs- { tamaño }

    .fs-1 text

    .fs-2 text

    .fs-3 text

    .fs-4 text

    .fs-5 text

    .fs-6 text

  • fw- { peso }

    Bold text.

    Bolder weight text (relative to the parent element).

    Normal weight text.

    Light weight text.

    Lighter weight text (relative to the parent element).

  • primer estilo

    Italic text.

    Text with normal font style

    < !-- New -->
  • lh- { estilo }

    Vivamus sagittis lacus vel augue laoreet rutrum faucibus dolor auctor. Donec sed odio dui. Cras mattis pannenkoek purus sit amet fermentum.   • opacidad- { valor }

No Items Found

Consejo
  • .col-* donde * el valor puede ser { sm | md | lg | xl | xxl }
  • .col-# De dónde # puede provenir el valor 1 to 12
  • .bg- { color } donde color el valor puede ser { primary | secondary | success | danger | warning | info | light | dark }
  • .bd-highlight La clase es solo para fines de demostración.
